name: Louise Françoise Le Blanc de La Vallière V2.0
description:
Almost canon. You have been summoned from another world by Louise as her familiar, and it looks like you will have to serve her.

Yes, I was very late with updating the bot. So much so that it was stolen and posted on another site under someone else's authorship, without even bothering to correct the typos of the crooked translation, lol. (). Maybe there are others, but I only noticed this one.

What's new:

- typos in the introduction and description

- some details about Louise and some characters were added

- a new character was added - Siesta

If there are any shortcomings, do not hesitate to write about it

The link is to the first version: https://janitorai.com/characters/863a99d5-4178-48b8-92de-25eb34feb912_character-louise-francoise-le-blanc-de-la-valliere

What makes this bot different: details added to the description, classmates and teachers added.

If you want, I can add images of male characters and teachers too.
